description: Demons and devils from the lower planes — tempters, destroyers, and infernal commanders.
creatures: Balrog
A towering demon of shadow and flame that cracks a whip of fire and wields a smoldering blade.
Succubus
A shape-shifting seducer that drains the life from victims through a single intoxicating kiss.
Imp
A bat-winged, barb-tailed little devil that whispers temptation and vanishes in a puff of brimstone.
Quasit
A tiny, shape-changing demon that perches on shoulders and corrupts mortals one whispered lie at a time.
Pit Fiend
A towering, winged archdevil wreathed in hellfire whose very presence corrupts the ground beneath it.
Balor
A flaming demon lord that detonates in a death-blast of fire when finally slain.
Vrock
A vulture-headed demon that shrieks to stun its prey and sheds clouds of toxic spores.
Hezrou
A hulking, toad-like demon that reeks of filth and spreads plague with its very presence.
Glabrezu
A four-armed, pincered demon that offers mortals their deepest wishes — always at a ruinous price.
Marilith
A six-armed, snake-bodied demon general that fights with a whirlwind of blades.
Bone Devil
A gaunt, skeletal fiend that flicks its scorpion tail and sees through every lie and disguise.
Chain Devil
A devil draped in animate chains that lash out to bind, drag, and flay victims alive.
Lemure
A mindless, bloblike mass of damned soul-flesh that reforms no matter how many times it is hacked apart.
Barbed Devil
A devil covered head to toe in iron barbs that tears flesh from anything it grapples.
Ice Devil
A towering, mantis-like fiend that radiates killing cold and impales foes on its frozen spear.
